properties.name: inputspec.base-path
properties.description: Base path for all InputSpec REST endpoints. Default: {@code /api/forms}

properties.name: inputspec.enabled
properties.description: Whether InputSpec auto-configuration is enabled. Default: {@code true}

properties.name: inputspec.mcp.enabled
properties.description:
Whether MCP Tool Server integration is enabled. Default: {@code false} (opt-in).

When enabled, the following MCP tools are registered:

  • {@code inputspec_list_forms} — discover available forms
  • {@code inputspec_get_form} — get full form specification
  • {@code inputspec_validate_form} — validate data without submitting
  • {@code inputspec_submit_form} — validate and submit data
